goal: Add chart display and filtering to the dashboard

subtasks.title: Create the dashboard layout
subtasks.dod: Key-metric cards and the chart area display responsively

subtasks.title: Implement the time-series chart component
subtasks.dod: A line chart of the selected metric is rendered

subtasks.title: Implement the filter UI
subtasks.dod: Data can be narrowed by date range and category

subtasks.title: Integrate the data-fetching API
subtasks.dod: Aggregated data matching the filter conditions is fetched

subtasks.title: Empty-state and loading display
subtasks.dod: The UX for no-data and loading states displays as defined

subtasks.title: Dashboard screen tests
subtasks.dod: It is tested that changing the filter updates the chart

risk_notes: Watch query performance with large data volumes
Check the bundle-size increase from the chart library
